title: Save a customer's payment method without making a payment
excerpt: Learn how to save a payment method and charge it later. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Checkout Sessions API](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/save-and-reuse.md?payment-ui=embedded-components) - [Setup Intents API](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/save-and-reuse.md?payment-ui=elements)
